subcodes.title: Words to Ibn-i-Asdaq, spoken on 1913-11-27
subcodes.first_line: Tell me how is the condition of Teaching? Do the believers Teach? This is that which the Blessed Perfection has required
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @universality of the Cause, @priority over other activities in teaching the Cause
